use_codes.desc: TO REDUCE PLASMA CHOLESTEROL LEVELS IN A MAMMAL
TO REDUCE PLASMA CHOLESTEROL LEVELS BY ADMIN EZETIMIBE IN COMBO WITH CHOLESTEROL BIOSYNTHESIS INHIB SELECTED FROM GROUP CONSISTING OF HMG COA REDUCTASE INHIBITORS INCL SIMVASTATIN
REDUCTION OF ELEVATED PLASMA STEROL AND/OR STANOL LEVELS IN A MAMMAL
TO REDUCE ELEVATED TOTAL-C, APO B, AND NON-HDL-C IN PATIENTS WITH PRIMARY HYPERLIPIDEMIA BY ADMINISTRATION OF EZETIMIBE IN COMBINATION WITH A STATIN
TO REDUCE ELEVATED TOTAL-C, LDL-C, APO B AND NON-HDL-C IN PATIENTS WITH PRIMARY HYPERLIPIDEMIA BY ADMINISTRATION OF EZETIMIBE ALONE OR IN COMBINATION WITH A STATIN OR WITH FENOFIBRATE
